scripts.build: echo 'Building app app-31...' && sleep 1.5 && echo 'Webpack: compiled successfully' && echo 'app-31 ready!'
scripts.dev: echo 'app-31 started on http://localhost:8001' && while true; do sleep 1; echo '[app-31] GET / 200 12ms'; done
scripts.test: echo 'E2E tests for app-31...' && sleep 0.8 && echo '  12 tests passed, 0 failed'
